sections_cited: Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. Nos. D- 1383 & 1384 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection No.22. 2) For hearing of Misc. No. 6922/2025. 3) For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Muhammad Aleem, Advocate for Petitioner. ________________ Mr. Aftab Ali Advocate has filed Vakalatnama of Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, Advocate on behalf of concerned Commissioner and submits that he is busy before another Bench. On the other hand, through this petition, the Petitioner has impugned order of blacklisting dated 14.01.2025 passed by Respondent No.3. However, against such blacklisting order, a remedy has been provided under Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 which remedy has been availed by way of a revision filed on 12.02.2025 which appears to be pending. In view of such position, since a remedy has already been availed, we while disposing of this petition direct the Respondent No.2 to decide the revision application already filed under Section 21 ibid within a period of seven days from the date of the order so received after affording opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner and in accordance with law. The Petition stands disposed of in these terms. Let copy of this order be issued to Respondent No.2 for compliance. Office to place copy of this order in connected petition. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Nasir/
